svg.title: SecureGuard AI — Conceptual domain model
svg.desc: Shows the five core domain objects: ScanRequest, Finding, RegistryEntry, Remediation, and PolicyResult, with their fields and relationships.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What fields does a ScanRequest object contain in SecureGuard?')
sendPrompt('What fields does a Finding object contain in SecureGuard?')
sendPrompt('What fields does a RegistryEntry contain in SecureGuard?')
sendPrompt('What fields does a Remediation object contain in SecureGuard?')
sendPrompt('What fields does a PolicyResult object contain in SecureGuard?')
sendPrompt('What does an AuditRecord store in SecureGuard?')

svg.text: Solid arrow = synchronous dependency Dashed arrow = async / lookup relationship
